name: owSeaTempAddr
label: Sea Temperature Address
description: 1-Wire device address for sea temperature sensor (16 hex chars, e.g. 28ff1234567890ab). Leave empty to disable.

name: owEngRoomAddr
label: Engine Room Temp Address
description: 1-Wire device address for engine room temperature sensor (16 hex chars). Leave empty to disable.

name: owEngineOilAddr
label: Engine Oil Temp Address
description: 1-Wire device address for engine oil temperature sensor (16 hex chars). Leave empty to disable.

name: owExhGasAddr
label: Exhaust Gas Temp Address
description: 1-Wire device address for exhaust gas temperature sensor (16 hex chars). Leave empty to disable.
